notes.master_usage: Use the master file for global dataset statistics.
notes.split_usage: Use final split files for experimental split sizes and roles.
notes.ace_dev_pool_warning: ace_dev_pool.json is an ACE development pool and may overlap with train, validation, or ace_playbook files.
notes.train_with_paraphrases_warning: train_with_paraphrases.json is an augmented training variant and should not be counted as additional original questions.
notes.per_file_distributions: All final files include distributions for source_dataset, answer_type, query_type, query_shape, complexity_level, human_or_generated, review_status, gold_status, number_of_patterns, special_types, and query_components.
